name: Swingeasy Golf Club - Yorba Linda
address: 22755 Savi Ranch Pkwy # G, Yorba Linda, CA 92887
about: Swingeasy Golf Club positions itself as a modern country club experience focused on combining social and competitive aspects of golf. The venue offers a simulator-based environment with private, fully furnished suites, each equipped with TVs for watching sporting events. Members benefit from monthly session bookings, ranging from 5 to 7 sessions depending on the membership tier, with the ability to bring up to 5 guests. The facility emphasizes a private and comfortable atmosphere, separate from traditional public driving ranges.
why_golfers_like_it: Completely private, spacious suites with TVs for a comfortable and exclusive experience
Advanced analytics and tracking software for compelling practice sessions using premium technology
Option to play 18 holes at various US courses in under 2 hours for a quick golf fix

food_and_drink.notes: Guests are welcome to bring their own outside food
No mention of alcohol service on the website

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, rental clubs are available for members and guests to use if necessary, though bringing your own set is recommended for a better experience.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Guests are welcome to bring their own outside food. A variety of soft drinks are available for purchase, but there is no mention of alcohol service.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: We recommend about 40 minutes per golfer to finish a full 18 holes. However, you can also play 9 holes or use the range for a shorter session.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is family-friendly and allows up to 6 guests per bay, making it suitable for families. The private suites offer a comfortable space for everyone.
